TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1978, ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 3, Amir Arison, squliq na Bunge'. pinqbaqan nya Amir Arison mqwas biru sa Pine Crest pqwasan biru. Amir Arison mqwas biru sa Columbia pqwasan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Amir Arison hiya ga m'engi, t'aring sa kawas 2003, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, amir aris~…ēon, s~…ēquliq na ő≤uŇče Ē. pinqő≤aqan nja amir aris~…ēon mqwas~…ē ő≤iru s~…ēa pine ¶~ ®res~…ēt pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. amir aris~…ēon mqwas~…ē ő≤iru s~…ēa ¶~ ®olumő≤ia pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru krańßu. mintzjuwaw nja amir aris~…ēon ńßija …£a m ĒeŇči, t ĒariŇč s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na eŇči ru mqwas~…ē. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ē
S.FORM: kawas tay 1978, ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 3, Amir Arison, squliq na Bunge'. pinqbaqan nya Amir Arison mqwas biru sa Pine Crest pqwasan biru. Amir Arison mqwas biru sa Columbia pqwasan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Amir Arison hiya ga m'engi, t'aring sa kawas 2003, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
